bead.title: server: warn about orphaned home .ddx server and tsnet state
bead.description:
PROBLEM: After `ddxroot.Path($HOME)` stops returning `~/.ddx/`, existing incorrectly-created home state such as `~/.ddx/server/` and `~/.ddx/tsnet/` becomes orphaned. Operators need an explicit startup signal so stale TLS or tsnet state does not keep confusing client/server trust debugging.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE: `cli/internal/ddxroot/ddxroot.go:Path()` previously allowed `~/.ddx/` to act as a project state root. High-risk server consumers include TLS cert/key state at `cli/internal/server/server.go:326` and tsnet state at `cli/internal/server/server.go:503`. Once the resolver falls through to XDG, those old home directories are no longer read by the server path helpers.

PROPOSED FIX: Add startup detection in the server path that checks for legacy `JoinHome("server")` and `JoinHome("tsnet")` directories when the active project state root resolves elsewhere. Emit a clear warning naming the orphan source and the active XDG/project state destination. Keep the behavior warning-only unless the implementation already has an established safe migration helper.

NON-SCOPE: Do not rename `~/.ddx/` to `~/.config/ddx/`. Do not address multi-project federation collisions. Do not change TLS-renew scheduling or rotation logic. Do not silently delete legacy home-state directories. Do not move unrelated user-global state such as `installed.yaml` or `plugins/`.
bead.acceptance:
1. Add `TestServerWarnsAboutOrphanHomeServerState` or the nearest package-appropriate named test proving startup emits a warning when `~/.ddx/server/` exists and the active `ddxroot.Path` destination is not `~/.ddx/`.
2. Add `TestServerWarnsAboutOrphanHomeTSNetState` or the nearest package-appropriate named test proving startup emits a warning when `~/.ddx/tsnet/` exists and the active state destination is not `~/.ddx/`.
3. The warning text identifies both the orphaned home path and the active state root so an operator can remove or migrate the stale directory intentionally.
4. `cd cli && go test -short ./internal/server/...` passes.
5. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
